entries.statement: From inside a single synthesis you cannot tell which parts are the world and which are the viewer, because the viewer is woven through every sentence.

canonical.statement: From inside a single synthesis you cannot tell which parts are the world and which are the viewer, because the viewer is woven through every sentence.

instructions: This bundle is a proposal that passed the origin kernel's gate structurally; it is not admitted anywhere. To submit it, open a pull request carrying the bundle to a target kernel: the target's own suite re-runs the gate over the patch, admission is the target's act, and semantic judgement of whether the cited support holds of the world is its community's, never asserted here.
